title: cornus intermedia
intro: Cornus intermedia, also known as the Chinese dogwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Cornus intermedia is used in herbal preparations, including extracts and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional.
